author: sumaiyanaazim
name: 12L Group-INT4 MLP + INT6 Attn + BigramHash(10240)
blurb: 12-layer transformer (dim=512, MLP 3x, GQA 8q/4kv) with SmearGate, BigramHash(10240, dim=128), orthogonal init, U-Net skip connections, group INT4 quantization (gs=64) for MLP, INT6 for attention, zstd-22, 8% magnitude pruning, SWA(frac=0.4), WD=0.04, batch=786432, warmdown=3000, sliding-window eval stride=64.
